calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Arthur C. Chambers, Esq. appears for the plaintiff.
Appearance by the plaintiff, who is sworn and tesifies.
No appearance by the defendant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant follows:

Compensatory Damages: $88,253.53
Punitive Damages: $0.00
Attorneys' fees - $4,950.00
Plaintiff to file a cost bill with the court.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
